Label: APAF-FR-01
Issue: Does not specify the format for telemetry data
Correction: The system shall acquire telemetry data in a standardized format such as CCSDS.

Label: APAF-FR-02
Issue: Does not specify the processing time for data sets
Correction: The system shall process all ASPERA-3 science data into IDFS data sets within 24 hours of acquisition.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: Does not specify the update frequency for web-based displays
Correction: The system shall update web-based displays of the most current ASPERA-3 data every 15 minutes.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: Does not specify the encryption method for password protection
Correction: The system web server shall use AES-256 encryption for password protection to allow only pertinent ASPERA-3 team members access.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: Does not specify the storage capacity for the production computer
Correction: The UNIX-based APAF system production computer shall have a minimum storage capacity of 10TB with an archival system.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: Does not specify the error handling mechanism for data distribution
Correction: The system shall log and notify the administrator of any errors during the electronic distribution of ASPERA-3 IDFS data within 24 hours.

Label: APAF-DR-02c
Issue: Does not specify the format for data submission to NASA PDS
Correction: The system shall provide ASPERA-3 data to NASA PDS in PDS4-compliant format no later than 6 months after acquisition.

Label: APAF-DS-II-4
Issue: Does not specify the type of operator input required
Correction: The system shall accept operator input for configuration changes via a secure web interface.

Label: APAF-DS-OI-1
Issue: Does not specify the distribution method for data sets
Correction: The system shall distribute ASPERA-3 and MEX OA IDFS data sets via secure FTP.

Label: APAF-DS-OI-4
Issue: Does not specify the user authentication method for web-based displays
Correction: The system shall use OAuth 2.0 for user authentication for web-based displays.
